location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
I. Key Accountabilities:
The IT Manager is the accountable owner for the stable, secure, and continuous day-to-day operation of Mekong's IT systems, ensuring that approved IT solutions are delivered and run reliably to support daily business operations.
The IT Manager owns the key results of the IT function, including ensuring that all results delivered by
Senior IT Officer
are achieved as planned.
1. IT Infrastructure & Operations:
Lead full accountability for the operation of all IT systems, servers, networks, hardware, software, and applications across the organization (HCM & HN).
Oversee cloud and platform services (e.g., Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Notion, Trello, BI, etc.) and ensure their stable, secure, and reliable day-to-day operation.
Ensure system availability, performance, operational stability, and business continuity for both office-based and remote users.
Be accountable for incident management, root cause analysis, and timely resolution of system outages or major IT issues.
2. Cybersecurity & Risk Management:
Enforce cybersecurity policies, standards, and operational controls across all IT systems.
Lead the execution and effectiveness of endpoint protection, data backup, disaster recovery, and incident response.
Ensure backup and recovery processes are tested and effective to support business continuity.
Coordinate vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, and remediation actions with security partners and vendors.
3. User Support & Training:
Lead the quality and effectiveness of IT user support services, including helpdesk operations (in-house or outsourced).
Ensure timely resolution of IT incidents related to hardware, software, video conferencing, and remote access.
Ensure consistent IT onboarding and essential user training to enable effective system usage across the organization.
4. Vendor & Budget Management:
Manage operational relationships with IT service providers and software vendors.
Lead contract execution, SLA compliance, service performance, renewals, and cost control.
Be accountable for vendor delivery quality and alignment with agreed operational requirements.
Support budgeting, payment requests, and periodic vendor performance reviews.
5. Systems & Compliance:
Lead the operation and ongoing reliability of fund management–specific systems (e.g., CRM, data rooms, portfolio monitoring tools).
Ensure systems are operated in compliance with data privacy regulations and internal policies.
Act as the IT point of accountability in supporting internal and external audits from a technology and systems operation perspective.
6. Digital Enablement & Project Execution:
Execute and roll out approved digital, automation, and AI-related initiatives in alignment with company strategy defined by leadership.
Coordinate internal IT resources and vendors to deliver digital solutions effectively.
Ensure deployed solutions are operationally stable, secure, and adopted by users.
Monitor post-implementation effectiveness and support continuous improvement from an operational perspective.
7. Other Taks:
Handle administrative task related to your activities (contract with vendors, making payment request, etc)
Other tasks requested by Partners or Directors
II. Key Requirements:
Minimum 3–5 years of experience in an IT Manager or IT Head role, with full ownership of end‑to‑end IT operations, including systems, infrastructure, cloud environments, system uptime, and incident management.
Proven ability to work with C‑suite stakeholders (CEO/Director), with a thorough approach to understanding requirements, accurately capturing details, and proactively clarifying any unclear points before execution.
Demonstrated leadership and ownership, including managing IT staff and/or external vendors and taking accountability when issues arise.
Solid understanding of enterprise IT architecture and modern delivery practices (e.g. Agile) is a strong advantage.
Fluent English Communications.
Results‑oriented: Focuses on outcomes, takes ownership, and delivers commitments end to end
Question & Discovery mindset: Asks the right questions to thoroughly understand requirements and clarify expectations.
Solution‑driven: Converts issues and requirements into practical, effective solutions.

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Eastspring is a global asset manager with Asia at its core. We create a culture in which diversity is celebrated and inclusion assured, for our colleagues, customers, and partners. We provide a platform for our people to do their best work and make an impact to the business, and in exchange, we support our people's career ambitions. We pledge to make Eastspring a place where you can Connect, Grow and Succeed.
Role Overview
The job holder is responsible for managing and delivering technology services through internal teams and third-party suppliers, overseeing IT software/hardware procurement, ensuring data privacy, information security, and disaster recovery plans, and managing the local technology budget.
The role also includes prioritizing and managing IT project requirements, supporting business teams IT needs, implementing group-level IT security and infrastructure changes, and maintaining business continuity plans. Collaboration with global teams and service providers is essential.
Key Accountabilities
Technology management:
Accountable for the delivery and management of all technology services through PVA’s technology team and via 3rd party regional suppliers and partners
Manage the IT software/hardware assets procurement process and respective vendor communications
Be the Data Privacy Officer (DPO) ensure compliance with Vietnam’s Personal Data Protection Law, develop and implement data privacy policies, oversee data processing and cross-border transfers, conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments, manage data breach response and reporting, and act as the primary liaison with regulatory authorities.
Oversight and ensure high-quality standards related to the management of Information risk and security whilst maintaining high system and information integrity and IT disaster recovery plans
Creation and ongoing management of the local technology budget including validation of any group recharges
IT Project Requirements Management
Prioritization and management of project initiatives and the creation of realistic timetables for the evaluation, development, and deployment of all technology solutions
Design and manage the data interaction between different systems of group and LBUs.
Support, implement and manage the IT requirements from other business teams, e.g. finance, compliance and investment
Group IT Project Requirements Management
Support and implement the IT requirements about IT security, infrastructure, architecture change from group levels
Maintain close working relationships with all teams across the global business including third party service providers
Business Continuity Management
Oversight and ensure that effective IT Disaster Recovery plan is produced, reviewed, amended and updated
Maintain and update Business Continuity Plan and Incident Management Plan according to Group requirement
Lead BCP arrangement and report to Group on regular basis
Qualifications & Requirements
Other tasks assigned by the manager.
Experience working with in-house and outsource technology service providers
Experience working with a multi-cultural multi-regional team
At least 3 years of experience in personal data processing, cybersecurity, or data security
Demonstrated experience with stakeholder management and negotiation skills is required to work with business and technology stakeholders.
Flexible and adaptable in a dynamic environment where priorities shift as we manage across multiple projects and hard deadlines.
Demonstrated ability to adapt to new technologies and learn quickly.
Proven IT management experience in foreign asset management company
Good written and verbal communication in English
Team player and yet able to work independently when required
Eastspring is an equal opportunity employer.
We provide equality of opportunity of benefits for all who apply and who perform work for our organisation irrespective of sex, race, age, ethnic origin, educational, social and cultural background, marital status, pregnancy and maternity, religion or belief, disability or part-time / fixed-term work, or any other status protected by applicable law. We encourage the same standards from our recruitment and third-party suppliers taking into account the context of grade, job and location. We also allow for reasonable adjustments to support people with individual physical or mental health requirements.

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Apply Now
Ho Chi Minh
Full-time
06/05/2026
FIREGROUP AT A GLANCE
Founded in 2016 in Vietnam, FireGroup Technology is committed to building world-class SaaS products that make a global impact on e-commerce. From the outset, we envisioned a world where running an online business is easy, effective, and sustainable, and we have been bringing that vision to life for nearly a decade.
Our portfolio includes TrueProfit, Transcy, OneMobile, OneLoyalty, Zopi, Promer, Ali Reviews. Trusted by more than 450,000 merchants in over 175 countries and recognized by global leaders such as Shopify, Google, Meta, TikTok, and Amazon, FireGroup is proud to elevate Vietnamese innovation onto the world stage.
Why build your career with FireGroup
Make a Global Impact: Contribute to products trusted by merchants worldwide and help solve real challenges that transform e-commerce.
Build with an AI-first Mindset: Use AI as your daily co-pilot to make smarter decisions and accelerate problem-solving at scale.
Unleash Your Potential: Fast-track your growth with career mobility, diverse learning resources, and an agile environment that empowers bold thinkers.
In a Culture That Connects Us As a Whole
What truly defines us is not only our technology but also our people, guided by our seven core values of Courage, Creativity, Growth, Teamwork, Ownership, Trust, and Empathy. At FireGroup, work is more than a job; it is a legacy in the making. We move with speed to solve meaningful challenges, and every Firer is encouraged to dream boldly, lead with courage, and create impact that endures.
Discover how our values come to life in every team and product we build on our culture page.
Responsibilities
Maintaining IT Operations: Ensure the organization operates smoothly and efficiently by maintaining IT activities such as applications, email systems, wireless networks, hardware, software, cameras, and related tools.
User Support: Take primary responsibility for guiding and installing user devices, ensuring that company systems and equipment are used efficiently and conveniently. Handle and resolve issues related to devices, accounts, networks, and more.
System Infrastructure Management: Manage and support IT infrastructure, including network (Wi-Fi), physical servers.
Linux Administration: Utilize and administer Linux systems to ensure stability and performance across the organization's IT infrastructure.
Performing Hardware and Software Upgrades: Ensure that the company’s systems, software, and computer configurations are consistently upgraded.
DevOps Support: Collaborate with DevOps teams to facilitate smooth software development and deployment processes.
VPN Management: Set up, manage, and support VPN systems for company employees.
Sourcing and Working with Suppliers: Identify and engage with suppliers based on the company's pricing regulations & Coordinate with suppliers to find the most optimal solutions.
Service Level Agreements (SLAs): Be familiar with SLAs and ensure proper response times in handling IT requests and issues.
Participating in Help Desk Projects: Participate in Helpdesk team projects and ensure they are completed on time and meet specified requirements.
Qualifications
1-3 years Helpdesk technician experience.
Working knowledge of the following technologies: Google Apps, Office 365 for Mac and PC, Active Directory, software based telephony, Jira service desk, SSO, JAMF, and Airwatch.
Experience with Linux system administration and network infrastructure, including Wi-Fi management.
Highly motivated with a positive attitude and excellent customer service skills.
Familiarity with writing technical documentation.
Understands ticket process, workflow and queue management.
Ability to work independently and within a team environment.
Ability to prioritize and address multiple tasks in a dynamic and high-paced work environment.
Job Benefits
We believe that motivation & personality of the employees are the only shortcut to the promotion of the corporate and contributions to the society. We will try our best to create a corporate environment where all employees can realize their dreams and goals.
Featured Benefits Include
Have opportunity to work with global merchants and join the dynamic, young and friendly project team; stable career path;
Attractive salary based on skills and experience; 13th month salary & seniority bonus; Employee’s marriage, maternity bonus; Birthday voucher gift;
Annual salary review;
PTI Healthcare, annual health check;
Regular technical seminar & external/ internal training courses;
Providing free coffee, tea & snack;
Internal engagement events: Team-building; Town-hall, birthday gift voucher, mid-autumn, new year and kick-off parties, yearly company trip;
FireGroup Sports Clubs: Running, Football, Badminton, etc;
Laptop/ PC/ Monitor are provided.
Contacts
Should you need more information about this job, reach out to us at:
Talent Acquistion team
FireGroup’s Linkedin fanpage

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
SUMMARY
Join Aperia Solutions, a leader in SaaS solutions for the Payments and Compliance industries. Aperia is a Texas-based fintech and managed consultancy firm that creates custom SaaS applications and other software-based solutions for the payments, banking, and processing industry. Founded in 1999, Aperia offers business intelligence, risk management, compliance, and customer intelligence platforms. With offices in Dallas, Washington DC, and Vietnam, Aperia is a fast-paced, global organization that strives to improve efficiency in compliance, risk, and customer service operations. Aperia’s clients include banks, processors, payment facilitators, merchant service providers, independent sales organizations, and government entities. A career at Aperia promises a great challenge, culture, and opportunities to forge your own path.
JOB DESCRIPTION
At Aperia, we rely on a dynamic team of IT. We’re seeking a highly motivated and hands-on experienced IT Manager who is ready to work with new technologies and to implement comprehensive IT processes in a forward-thinking organization that’s always pushing boundaries. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of the IT team, provide leading and managing IT activities for supporting Aperia’s products. The ideal candidate has a strong background in team leadership, performance management, on-prem and Cloud transformation experience.
CORE RESPONSIBILITIES
Oversee all technology operations (e.g. DevOps, CI/CD, systems administration, network administration, desktop support) and evaluate them according to established goals.
Maintain IT infrastructure including operating systems, Office365, email systems, security and development tools, applications, servers, desktop, laptops, software, hardware, Azure services and Internet connectivity
Track and maintain hardware and software inventory
Oversee all cloud services required for FedRAMP High compliance
Research and evaluate emerging technologies related to Cloud services, and DevOps
Evaluate current and future technology capabilities and make recommendations to advance products.
Recommend efficient and cost-effective infrastructure equipment, infrastructure as a service (IAAS), software, and software as a service (SAAS).
Inspect and monitor use of infrastructure equipment, cloud services, and software to ensure functionality and efficiency.
Manage IT initiatives by business priority and be able to clearly communicate statuses to management.
Collaborate with security, database, development teams and other professionals to provide superior service levels to the company.
FUNCTIONAL RESPONSIBILITIES
Analyze business requirements as a whole and all departments to determine technology needs
Analyze infrastructure and cloud services need to support a suite of enterprise Software as a Service products
Analyse technologies, processes, and vendors continually to find areas for improvement
Ensure IT infrastructure and software services achieve SLAs
Maintain, monitor and proactive care IT services to keep business continuity and disaster recovery
Communicate relentlessly with team, manager, leadership, and sponsors to ensure transparency.
Effectively work on multiple concurrent projects and with multiple competing priorities.
Conduct training for employees to use software/hardware, to troubleshoot issues and provide technical support when needed
REQUIRED SKILLS
Technical
5+ of experience in IT management
Azure cloud infrastructure (VDI, DevBox, AD Connect, networking)
Infrastructure as code, platform engineering (terraform, bicep, configuration management)
On-premises infrastructure (Windows Server, VMware, networking)
Cisco ASA/Firepower configuration
PCI DSS or similar compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc)
Patch management and change control
Backup and disaster recovery
Leadership & Coordination
IT team management (local and remote coordination)
Cross-functional collaboration with DevOps and project teams
Vendor management
Communication with US-based leadership
Adaptability and flexibility
Resilience
Operational Skills
Helpdesk and support services oversight
Documentation and knowledge management
Process improvement and automation
THINGS THAT WILL SEPARATE YOU FROM THE REST
Experience in working with global teams to lead IT initiatives.
EDUCATION
BSc/BA, preferred in Information Technology, System
ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS
Must be willing to submit to a background investigation and drug test as part of the selection process.
JOB TYPE
Full-Time
SCHEDULE
Monday to Friday
WORK LOCATION
The Six8 Building: 24-26 Phan Dinh Giot, Ward 2, Tan Binh District, Ho Chi Minh City
BENEFITS
Health insurance
Dental insurance
Paid time off
Parental leave
Childcare assistance
Education reimbursement
This job description is not intended to be all-inclusive. An employee may also perform other reasonable related business duties as assigned by their immediate supervisor or management.

location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
General Purpose:
The IT Support Engineer provides Tier 2/3 technical support and serves as a key escalation resource for service desk issues. This role is responsible for diagnosing and resolving moderately complex technical problems across endpoints, collaboration platforms, identity systems, and core infrastructure.
In addition to reactive support, this position plays an active role in system maintenance, security enforcement, automation efforts, documentation, and process optimization. The ideal candidate is highly customer-focused, technically proficient, and capable of working independently while collaborating closely with senior infrastructure engineers.
Position Summary, Responsibilities and Expectations:
• Troubleshoot and resolve complex hardware, software, network, and cloud-related issues
• Manage incidents, service requests, and problem records in ITSM tools (Jira Service Management)
• Perform root cause analysis and contribute to long-term problem resolution
• Meet defined SLAs and KPIs while maintaining high customer satisfaction
• Develop and maintain technical knowledge base documentation
Endpoint & Device Management
• Deploy, configure, and support Windows and macOS endpoints
• Administer endpoint management platforms (Microsoft Intune, Autopilot, JAMF, SCCM or similar)
• Support device compliance policies, patching, encryption, and endpoint security tools
• Manage hardware lifecycle, asset inventory, and imaging processes
Microsoft 365 & Identity Administration
• Administer Microsoft 365 services (Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive)
• Manage user provisioning and deprovisioning processes
• Configure and troubleshoot Azure AD / Entra ID, MFA, conditional access, and group policies
• Support enterprise collaboration and SaaS platforms
Infrastructure & Systems Support
• Support network connectivity issues (DNS, DHCP, VPN, wireless, routing/switching fundamentals)
• Assist with VMware vSphere administration and virtual machine management
• Provide support for Windows server environments and basic Linux systems
• Assist with backup verification and disaster recovery procedures
Security & Compliance
• Enforce endpoint security standards and patch management processes
• Support vulnerability remediation efforts
• Participate in security incident response activities
• Maintain least-privilege access and identity governance best practices
Continuous Improvement
• Identify recurring issues and recommend process or technical improvements
• Assist in automation initiatives (PowerShell scripting or similar)
• Participate in on-call rotation as required
• Contribute to service metrics reporting and operational reviews
Essential Skills and Experience:
• 3–5 years of hands-on IT support experience in a corporate environment
• Proven experience operating in a Tier 2 or escalation support role
• Strong troubleshooting skills across Windows and macOS platforms
• Experience administering Microsoft 365 and Azure AD / Entra ID
• Experience with endpoint management solutions (Intune, JAMF, etc.)
• Working knowledge of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN)
• Experience with ITSM/service desk platforms
• Strong understanding of endpoint security and patch management practices
• Excellent and fluent English communication and customer service skills
Preferred Qualifications:
• Experience with VMware vSphere or similar virtualization platforms
• Experience supporting Windows Server and/or Linux systems
• Experience with Palo Alto Networks firewalls
• ITIL Foundation certification or working knowledge of ITIL framework
• Basic scripting/automation experience (PowerShell preferred)
• Experience supporting hybrid or cloud-first environments

job_title: Ho Chi Minh Cabin Crew Opportunities (Dubai Based, Relocation Provided)
location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
Job Purpose
A personality that shines, the ability to adapt to any situation and make people feel at ease. These are a few of the qualities we’re looking for in our cabin crew.
As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so you need to be friendly, observant and able to provide the right support.
Being a member of the cabin crew is so much more than a service role - safety is our highest priority. You’ll need to lead confidently and take control when it comes to managing aircraft services, security, and safety procedures. This comes from the world-class learning experience our crew receive at our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai.
Qualifications & Experience
Here are some other things we look for in our cabin crew:
You’ve had more than a year’s experience in hospitality/customer service
You have a positive attitude and the natural ability to provide excellent service in a team environment, dealing with people from many cultures
Your minimum qualification is high school graduate (Grade 12)
You need to be fluent in written and spoken English
You’re at least 160cm tall and can reach 212 cm while standing on tiptoes, to enable you to reach emergency equipment on all aircraft types
No visible tattoos while you’re in Emirates cabin crew uniform (without covering them with bandages or cosmetics)
As Emirates cabin crew, you’ll be based in Dubai and will need to meet the UAE's employment visa requirements
Aside from the requirements of the role, you should be determined to always perform to the highest standards, focus on being solution oriented, and be able to manage a demanding work schedule. You should have the ability to deliver an authentic experience to our customers. You’ll be culturally aware and reflect the Emirates personality - professional, empathetic, progressive, visionary and cosmopolitan.
Before clicking the Apply button, please keep the following
documents
ready to submit with your application:
Recent CV in English
Recent photo
Salary & Benefits
Your pay is made up of three components:
a fixed basic salary,
an hourly pay for operated flights and
an overseas meal allowance.
Basic salary = AED 4,980 / month,
Flying Pay = AED 69.60 / hour based on avg. 80-100 hours / month,
Average Total Pay = AED 11,244 / month (~USD 3,100, EUR 2,600 or GBP 2,280)
* These are approximate numbers for Grade II (Economy Class).
Meal allowances for night stops are credited to the salary in arrears the following month.
Hotel accommodation as well as transport to and from the airport is provided by the company.
Join Emirates as cabin crew and enjoy a competitive, tax-free salary, flying pay, profit share, and concessional travel. Benefit from comprehensive relocation support to help you settle in Dubai, along with free accommodation and transportation. You will also receive excellent medical, life, and dental insurance, and more. Additionally, your friends and family can enjoy deeply discounted flights, creating lasting memories together.

location: Can Tho, Can Tho, Vietnam
job_description:
Số lượng: 1 người
Kinh nghiệm: 1 - 2 năm
Bằng cấp: Trung cấp trở lên
Cấp bậc: Nhân viên
Nơi làm việc: Đồng Nai
Thu nhập/ tháng: 10 - 15 Triệu
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Vị trí IT Help Desk đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc hỗ trợ kỹ thuật cho người dùng cuối, bảo đảm hệ thống thông tin của tổ chức hoạt động ổn định và hiệu quả. Cụ thể, người giữ vị trí này sẽ chịu trách nhiệm giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật, từ đơn giản đến phức tạp, qua điện thoại hoặc trực tiếp. Họ cũng sẽ cung cấp hướng dẫn và tư vấn cho người dùng về cách sử dụng các ứng dụng và phần mềm hiệu quả. Bên cạnh đó, IT Help Desk còn theo dõi và ghi chép các sự cố kỹ thuật để phân tích và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống thông tin.
Xác định, chẩn đoán, giải quyết vấn đề của người sử dụng máy tính cá nhân, phần mềm máy tính và phần cứng, mạng, internet, e-mail, dial-in, các vấn đề truy cập mạng; và các vấn đề máy in, photo copy, điện thoại, camera…
Cung cấp hỗ trợ cài đặt, cấu hình cho người dùng các phần cứng máy tính để bàn, phần mềm, và thiết bị ngoại vi.
Vận hành và duy trì hệ thống server, mạng LAN, WAN, camera…
Sửa chữa đúng hạn các thiết bị hoặc bảo hành, bảo trì từ nhà cung cấp bên thứ ba theo thỏa thuận hợp đồng.
Chịu trách nhiệm bảo trì, sửa chữa các thiết bị máy tính, mạng toàn công ty. Thực hiện sửa chữa phần cứng máy tính, các thiết bị máy tính PC và các thiết bị ngoại vi không được thỏa thuận bảo dưỡng của bên thứ ba nhà cung cấp.
Giúp cài đặt mạng nội bộ, hệ thống cáp và các thiết bị như card mạng, hub và switch.
Hỗ trợ, hướng dẫn người dùng xử lý các vấn đề liên quan đến IT. Phối hợp với các kỹ thuật viên khác trong việc tạo ra tài liệu liệu hướng dẫn cho người dùng cuối câu hỏi thường gặp (FAQs).
Kiểm kê, quản lý tài sản cố định & Các công việc khác theo yêu cầu của cấp trên.
Yêu Cầu Công Việc
Có kinh nghiệm ít nhất 1 năm, tốt nghiệp trung cấp, cao đẳng công nghệ thông tin trở lên
Có kiến thức windows server, hệ thống camera, Database
Có kiến thức chuyên môn cơ bản về các hệ thống máy chủ, các hệ điều hành
Có kiến thức về hệ thống mạng LAN/WAN, cấu hình các thiết bị mạng
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập hoặc làm việc theo nhóm tốt, luôn chủ động trong công việc, có tinh thần trách nhiệm và tính kỷ luật cao
Có thể đọc - hiểu & làm báo cáo bằng Tiếng anh
ĐỊA ĐIỂM & THỜI GIAN LÀM VIỆC:
Địa điểm: Lô II - 11, KCN Hố Nai, Xã Hố Nai 3, Huyện Trảng Bom, Tỉnh Đồng Nai, Việt Nam
Thời gian làm việc: 7:30 - 16:30 (Thứ 2 - Thứ 7), nghỉ 2 ngày thứ 7 trong tháng

job_description:
Overall Job Purpose:
The IT Helpdesk Analyst (Service Desk L1) serves as the primary point of contact for IT-related incidents and service requests. The role ensures timely issue resolution, effective ticket management, and high customer satisfaction aligned with SLA targets.
Main Duties of Job:
Act as Single Point of Contact (SPOC) for IT support via phone, email, portal, and chat.
Log, categorize, prioritize, and manage incidents and service requests in ITSM tools.
Perform first-line troubleshooting and attempt first-time fixes for common IT issues.
Fulfil standard service requests using approved runbooks.
Escalate complex issues to Desktop Support or 3rd Line teams with complete documentation.
Provide clear and timely communication to users throughout ticket lifecycle.
Support Major Incident handling with communication and coordination tasks.
Maintain ticket hygiene including updates, categorization, and closure notes.
Ensure compliance with IT security and data protection policies.
Meet SLA targets, customer satisfaction, and quality KPIs.
Skills, Knowledge & Experience:
Fluent in English communications
Basic knowledge of Windows OS and Microsoft 365.
Familiarity with ITSM tools such as ServiceNow.
Strong customer service and communication skills.
Problem-solving and multitasking ability.
Report Line
SCCVN Corp IT Manager
About Our Company
SCC (Specialist Computer Centres) Ltd
.
Floor 3-6-8, Mapletree Business Center, 1060 Nguyen Van Linh Blvd, Ho Chi Minh City
People do business. We make it work.
We enable people to do business by planning, supplying, integrating and managing their IT. We make IT work through partnership, knowledge and passion: trusted to run IT infrastructure and services for leading business across Europe for over 40 years.
We run IT infrastructure and services for over 2,500 customers in more than 50 countries. We operate out of 75 locations in the UK, France, Romania, Spain and Vietnam. International scope and scale is what makes SCC the first choice for customers, partners and employees. We achieve this by nurturing a winning, global network of partners to create enduring value to our customers.
SCC Vietnam plays a key role in providing internal and customer services to the UK and French businesses in the group by working directly and collaboratively with the teams in the Romania, France and the UK every day.

Market business expects solid and best in class infrastructure support services, service management and project delivery. The Assistant Manager Tech Infrastructure will contribute to seamless running of IT services (day to day support) as well as project delivery (opening, closing & revamp activities) across a specific adidas market/country.He/she is also supporting the service quality of all end user services (e.g. Connectivity, Service Desk, Onsite Support a.k.a. SPOC to local business team members around overall service performance & escalation mgmt.

job_description:
Location: Ho Chi Minh
Expired date: 31/03/2026
Team: Engineering
About Urbox
UrBox is Vietnam’s leading digital gifting & loyalty platform that enables businesses to integrate their reward & loyalty programs with an ever-growing network of more than 350 brands & 20,000 accepted online and offline stores in Vietnam.
UrBox has the widest network of clients in loyalty in Vietnam and provides loyalty & reward solutions to many big organizations in the aviation, banking, FMCG, Insurance, Real Estate industries and more.
Key Responsibilities
IT Helpdesk Leader
is responsible for leading the IT Helpdesk team, ensuring the company’s IT systems operate smoothly and securely. The role involves managing support operations, overseeing IT infrastructure, coordinating internal IT services, and supporting business operations, including Google Workspace administration.
Lead and manage the IT Helpdesk team, assign tasks, and monitor performance.
Receive, prioritize, track, and ensure timely resolution of technical support requests from departments.
Troubleshoot and provide advanced support for hardware (computers, printers, scanners) and network (LAN/WAN) issues.
Oversee installation, configuration, and upgrade of software and systems.
Ensure effective use, operation, and availability of IT equipment across the company.
Plan and perform periodic maintenance of IT systems and devices.
Manage, administer, and optimize Google Workspace services.
Supervise IT onboarding (equipment preparation, account setup, user guidance) and offboarding (equipment and account recovery) processes.
Coordinate IT equipment procurement, inventory management, vendor support, and repair activities.
Develop and improve IT support processes, documentation, and internal guidelines.
Report IT operations, issues, and improvement plans to management; collaborate with stakeholders to enhance IT systems.
Requirements
Graduated from College/University in Information Technology.
Computer Networks, System Administration, Computer Science, or equivalent.
Able to read technical English documents (TOEIC 500+ or equivalent).
Minimum 3-5 years of experience in IT Helpdesk or IT Support.
At least 1 year of experience in a team lead, senior, or equivalent role is preferred.
Strong knowledge of computer hardware and peripherals (printers, scanners, etc.).
Proficient in Windows OS (client and basic server knowledge).

Bouygues Construction IT Vietnam is a part of Bouygues Construction IT, a trusted partner for the business lines which provides competitiveness of the Bouygues Construction Group and promotes its digital transformation.
As an IT Local Support, you will be the first point of contact for end users, providing hands-on technical support and ensuring the reliability of local IT systems and infrastructure. Working closely with global IT teams in Vietnam and Morocco, you will manage daily operations, troubleshoot issues, and maintain hardware, software, and network stability in line with the company’s IT standards.
Your Main Responsibilities Will Be
Provide Level 1–2 system and application support to end users.
Perform local system administration (server/network) at Level 1–2.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware issues.
Ensure the smooth operation of computers, mobile devices, network equipment, and printers, as well as end-users’ requirements in lie with user’s requirements and company policies.
Support internal & external meetings, including video conferencing, MS Teams Meeting, and presentation.
Manage IT hardware inventory and coordinate maintenance.
Monitor backups and network infrastructure to ensure system reliability.
Mandatory
OUR REQUIREMENTS:
Solid understanding of system and network administration, with 3 years of hands-on experience.
Proven expertise in managing and troubleshooting network devices (switches, routers, LAN, VPN), with the ability to identify and isolate issues at the device, port, or protocol level.
Proficient in Microsoft environments, including Office 365, Active Directory, Outlook, Windows 10, SCCM, and Intune.
Fluent in English; proficiency in French is a strong plus.
General Skills
Strong communication skills; friendly and service-oriented attitude.
Organized, methodical, and detail-focused.
Team player with the ability to work independently.
Committed to quality, reliability, and continuous improvement.
Responsible, proactive, and customer-focused.

job_description:
SCG Vietnam – Build the Future with Us
Driving Vietnam’s Growth with Innovation and Excellence
For over a century, SCG has led industrial innovation across ASEAN, shaping the future of construction, materials science, packaging, and sustainability. Vietnam, one of the region’s fastest-growing economies, is central to SCG’s long-term vision. With a strong presence in multiple industries, we are committed to delivering high-quality solutions, developing local talent, and investing in sustainable growth.
Our operations in Vietnam cover key business sectors:
SCG Cement-Building Materials
– Providing innovative and durable construction solutions to support Vietnam’s rapid urbanization and infrastructure expansion.
SCG Chemicals
– Advancing polymer and chemical solutions for industrial applications while driving environmental responsibility.
SCG Packaging
– Delivering sustainable packaging solutions to meet the needs of Vietnam’s growing consumer and manufacturing sectors.
SCG International
– Enhancing Vietnam’s trade networks through industrial sourcing, supply chain solutions, and cross-border partnerships.
Vietnam’s rapid economic transformation presents exceptional opportunities for skilled professionals. SCG is looking for high-potential individuals to be part of this journey, driving progress and shaping industries.
Why SCG? A Workplace Designed for Growth
Career Development Without Limits
SCG is more than a workplace—it is a gateway to a
regional and global career.
Employees gain exposure to
cross-border projects, cutting-edge innovations, and international business networks.
Accelerated Professional Growth
SCG actively invests in
leadership training, mentorship programs, and career mobility.
High-performing employees are fast-tracked into key positions, ensuring that growth is based on
capability, not tenure.
Innovation & Sustainability at the Core
SCG is at the forefront of
smart manufacturing, digital transformation, renewable energy, and circular economy initiatives.
Employees contribute to projects that
drive long-term impact
on industries and communities.
A Collaborative & Inclusive Work Environment
SCG Vietnam fosters a workplace where diverse perspectives and
team-driven success
lead to
continuous improvement and innovation.
Employees are empowered to share ideas, take initiative, and work alongside leading industry professionals.
Competitive Compensation & Long-Term Stability
SCG offers:
Market-competitive salary packages and performance-based rewards.
Career mobility across SCG’s operations in Vietnam, Thailand, and other ASEAN countries.
Continuous learning opportunities, upskilling programs, and industry-leading mentorship.
Find Your Place at SCG Vietnam
SCG is hiring across multiple disciplines, including:
Engineering & Manufacturing
– Mechanical, Chemical, Electrical, and Industrial Engineering.
Business & Commercial
– Supply Chain, Procurement, Trade, and Business Strategy.
Digital & Technology
– AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, Data Science, and Software Development.
Branding & Marketing
– Consumer Insights, Digital Marketing, and Product Innovation.
Finance & Risk Management
– Accounting, Investment, Internal Audit.
Sustainability & Renewable Energy
– Circular Economy, Green Manufacturing, and Renewable Energy Solutions.
And many more!
Not sure where you fit?
Apply anyway—SCG values skills, ambition, and problem-solving capabilities over rigid qualifications.
Build Your Career with SCG Vietnam
Vietnam’s industries are evolving rapidly, and SCG is shaping that transformation. If you want to work on projects that drive real-world impact, foster sustainability, and push the boundaries of innovation, this is your opportunity.
Apply today and take the next step toward an exciting career with SCG.
*While we strive to match opportunities based on individual preferences and expertise, availability may vary depending on business needs. However, we will always do our best to align opportunities with your aspirations and capabilities.

location: Cà Mau, Ca Mau, Vietnam
job_description:
Position Summary
About the job ITSM Jira Administrator
ITSM Jira Administrator
The IT Service Manager communicates and implements standard ITSM processes including incident, change, and problem management. S/he brings ITIL principles, theories, and concepts related to requirements, data, usability, and process analysis for incident and change management, CMDB, asset, software licensing, and contract management.
This position requires a strong understanding of cybersecurity principles, risk management, and compliance frameworks.
You will play a critical role in evaluating and mitigating cybersecurity engineering risks, ensuring adherence to legal requirements, regulations, and industry standards, and supporting a regulated manufacturing and health field environment.
Position based onsite https://itcworldwide.com/locations
Essential Duties And Responsibilities
Solid understanding ITSM principles, promoting ITIL best practice across the full life cycle of services.
Collaborate with internal teams, including IT, legal, HR, supply chain, governance and compliance, to define and implement appropriate controls and safeguards towards service management services.
Manage and report incidents, change, and problem service levels for both internal and external teams.
Participate in the evaluation, design, and implementation of new systems that increase productivity or enhance overall business operations.
Manage Change Advisory Board (CAB) and Release Management Processes.
Conduct periodic assessments and reviews of the entire Service Level Management (SLM) process.
Ensure request, incident, problem, and change records are accurate and complete, from creation to closure.
Assist in creating and maintaining IT operational workflows, knowledge documents, reports, portal content, and communications to IT and business customers.
A significant responsibility for this new role will be to assist the Service Innovation in transitioning projects into production services, using a standard design and transition process.
Holder will take the lead in maintaining, publicizing, and promoting the IT Services problem management policy and process. They will ensure effective management and coordination of root cause analysis activities for problem resolution.
Facilitate major incident conference bridges, accurately identifying and logging attendees, timelines and troubleshooting steps taken.
Coordinate planned change management for Enterprise Applications, M365 on Windows and Mac environments, Network and Security Operations and log results to peruse continuous improvement.
Proficient in ITSM tool administration and management system, Jira preferred. Manage Engine or Jira experience accepted.
Contribute to ITSM Knowledge Base.
Full vendor management for help desk and service management engagements, development teams, IT operations support, SOC and others as required.
Produce and track metrics within ITSM parameters and defined SLAs an SLOs.
Assist in Systems Certification processes for the ISO, SOC, PCI and FDA frameworks, including preparing requested proof of documentation, coordinating with stakeholders.
Participant in risk assessments.
Participate in all related processes and tracking for Business Continuity Processes and Recovery.
Documentation and Reporting: prepare and maintain comprehensive documentation, including information and service management plans, service agreement reports, system operational service agreements, and compliance reports.
Collaboration and Communication: collaborate with cross-functional teams, system engineers, architects, IT personnel, and external stakeholders to address cybersecurity concerns, provide guidance on security controls, and facilitate effective communication.
Industry Trends and Best Practices: stay up to date with the latest IT service management trends.
Support IT Leadership with assessment and authorization requirements and drafting/updating related documentation.
Microsoft Certification (Required)
AZ-800: Administering Windows Server Hybrid Core Infrastructure
AZ-801: Configuring Windows Server Hybrid Advanced Services
AZ-500: Microsoft Azure Security Technologies
SC-200: Microsoft Security Operations Analyst
SC-400: Microsoft Information Protection Administrator
AZ-700: Designing and Implementing Microsoft Azure Networking Solutions
Jira Certification (Required)
ACP-420 Managing Jira Service Projects for Cloud
Atlassian Certified Associate - ITSM with Jira Service Management
Atlassian Certified Associate - Jira Software Board Configuration
Critical Responsibilities
Provide technical leadership for planning, designing, installing, testing, and implementing Atlassian solutions.
Provide subject matter expertise on the SDLC platforms we maintain (Confluence, Jira, Spira Test).
Implementing Atlassian plugins and supporting integration with other enterprise software.
Supports Knowledge Management (KM) program strategy, transformation, and technical implementation.
Creates knowledge documentation related to requirements and solution design.
Facilitates knowledge transfer sessions for administration and self-service. Develop a train the trainer model for support and administration.
Critical Qualifications
3+ years of experience in implementing Atlassian products.
Experience with RESTful APIs, JSON, and XML.
Experience with Agile/Scrum or DevOps methodologies.
Experience With SQL, Python, PowerShell, Or Other Scripting Languages
Experience with System and Data Architecture
Experience or knowledge of SDLC pipeline tools such as Git, Jenkins,
Preferred Experience
Have demonstrable experience and aptitude in working in a matrix organization where effective and robust negotiating skills are used successfully while maintaining good working relationships with members of that organization.
Sufficient technical background to understand the different architectures of the core systems, and to understand the impact of new technologies.
Experience of using ITIL processes, current ITIL certification preferred.
ITIL certified and a willingness to achieve formal ITIL certifications.
Careful attention to detail and an ability to demonstrate an understanding of the need for standards in IT.
The ability to plan, prioritize and organize work to meet tight deadlines.
Experience of using project plans.
Ability to work & collaborate effectively within a team environment.
Motivated to learn new technologies and produce process improvements and efficiencies.
Sense of urgency and able to prioritize work.
Ability to adopt change while continuing to deliver on assigned objectives.
Excellent communication skills to communicate complex quantitative analysis in a clear, precise, and actionable manner.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate security controls into the development and implementation of new systems, applications, and processes.
General Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in related engineering, computer science, or a related field.
5+ years in cybersecurity, compliance, and risk management, with a focus on system certification and accreditation.
Strong knowledge of ITIL and Service Management frameworks.
Familiarity with related industry processes, policies, and ITIL/ITSM guidelines.
Experience with conducting CAB, risk analysis, and IT release management.
Familiarity with security controls, technologies, and best practices, including cyber security, access management, data protection, as well as incident management and response.
Experience conducting compliance assessments, audits, and risk assessments.
Solid understanding of network security principles, End point Security, secure system configurations, encryption technologies, and assurance of industrial networks
Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Up-to-date knowledge of emerging security trends, threats, and technologies.

Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành liên quan.

Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm phát triển Java hoặc C#.
Sẵn sàng làm việc theo ca nếu có yêu cầu.

SQL Server FTP Windows Server C# Windows Java SQL

Quản lý cấp phát, thu hồi license theo từng nhóm người dùng (Frontline, Enterprise, Copilot, Teams Rooms).
Kiểm tra trạng thái license, thời hạn sử dụng, hóa đơn định kỳ.
Xử lý lỗi liên quan đến license không kích hoạt, license bị thu hồi hoặc không đồng bộ.
Tư vấn nâng cấp, chuyển đổi loại license phù hợp với nhu cầu vận hành thực tế.
Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật các issue hàng ngày
Xử lý lỗi đăng nhập, xác thực đa yếu tố, lỗi kết nối dịch vụ Microsoft 365.
Hỗ trợ khôi phục quyền truy cập, cấu hình bảo mật cho Teams, Outlook, SharePoint, OneDrive.
Giải quyết lỗi đồng bộ dữ liệu, lỗi gửi nhận email, lỗi cuộc họp Teams Rooms.
Hỗ trợ cấu hình Teams Enterprise, Copilot, và các tính năng nâng cao theo từng nhóm license.
Tư vấn, giải đáp thắc mắc trong quá trình quản trị vận hành
Hướng dẫn sử dụng Microsoft 365 Admin Center, Azure Portal để quản trị tenant.
Phối hợp Kỹ thuật Lv2 tư vấn phân quyền người dùng, thiết lập chính sách bảo mật, cấu hình Teams Rooms.
Giải đáp các câu hỏi liên quan đến vận hành, quản trị, tích hợp dịch vụ Microsoft Cloud.
Hỗ trợ tạo ticket với Microsoft nếu có sự cố vượt ngoài phạm vi xử lý.
Phối hợp với Kỹ sư LV2 rà soát, đánh giá, đề xuất phương thức khai thác dịch vụ, bảo mật dịch vụ và các yêu cầu kỹ thuật cần phối hợp trực tiếp tại site.
Cập nhật tài liệu IT
Cập nhật tài liệu hướng dẫn người dùng (nếu có)
Báo cáo định kỳ và đề xuất phương án tối ưu.

Kỹ năng viết email.

Mức lương cạnh tranh + phụ cấp dự án
Tổng thu nhập lên tới 13 tháng lương/năm

job_title: Customer Solutions Consultant, Platform, Google Cloud
location: Vietnam
job_description:
Please visit this Google Careers posting for the Vietnamese-translated version of this role.
Note: Google's hybrid workplace includes remote roles.
Remote location: Vietnam.
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
6 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
Experience with cloud engineering, on-premise engineering, virtualization, or containerization platforms.
Experience engaging with, or presenting to, technical stakeholders or executive leaders.
Experience in programming languages, debugging, systems design, prototyping, demos, or customer workshops.
Preferred qualifications:
Experience promoting technical solutions in Cloud AI.
Experience driving the entire business cycle (e.g., defining the delivery and consumption plan and transitioning it for execution).
Experience with security concepts (e.g., encryption, identity management, access control, attack vectors).
Experience building technical strategies to uncover new workloads with customers.
Experience migrating applications and services to cloud platforms.
About The Job
The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.
As a Platform Customer Solutions Consultant, you will partner with sales teams to differentiate Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to the customers and serve as the customer’s primary technical partner and advisor, engaging in technical-led conversations to understand business issues. You will troubleshoot technical questions and roadblocks, engage in proofs-of-concepts and demos, and use the expertise to architect cross-pillar cloud solutions that solve business issues. You will drive the technical win and define the delivery and consumption plans to engage with technical and business leaders, and present solutions. You will focus on identifying, pursuing, and winning new business workloads and driving engagement within existing ones.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
Responsibilities
Develop and own the technical account plan and strategy, participate in planning and support the business goals.
Combine sales, programming, and solutions architecture expertise to prove the value of Google Cloud Platform (GCP) across the portfolio through demos, pilots and workshops.
Architect cross-pillar solutions, drive technical wins, and define initial delivery plans for customers, and continue to lead the technical engagement in the solution phase.
Facilitate the post-sales transition by supporting pricing activities and transitioning the final delivery plan to implementation teams.
Maintain awareness of progress against the delivery plan, provide support to cross-functional teams during ramp, delivery, migration or implementation phases.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Company Overview:
MOOVTEK is an innovative transportation technology startup focused on creating seamless and user-friendly mobile applications. Our goal is to revolutionize the transportation industry by leveraging cutting-edge technology to provide efficient, secure, and convenient services for our users.
Job Description:
We are looking for a skilled
IT Business Analyst (BA)
to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions. The BA will collaborate with stakeholders, gather requirements, analyze business processes, and help ensure that our technology solutions align with company goals.
Key Responsibilities:
Work closely with stakeholders (internal teams, clients, and users) to gather, analyze, and document business and functional requirements.
Translate business needs into detailed technical specifications for the development team.
Assist in defining user stories, workflows, and wireframes for product features.
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure a seamless user experience.
Work with developers and testers to ensure requirements are properly implemented.
Participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, and product roadmap discussions.
Analyze and improve existing business processes to enhance operational efficiency.
Develop and maintain documentation including Business Requirement Documents (BRD), Functional Requirement Documents (FRD), and Use Case documents.
Conduct market research and competitor analysis to inform business strategies.
Support UAT (User Acceptance Testing) and work with Quality Control (QC) to validate functionality.
Provide ongoing support and training for internal teams.
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
At least 2 years of experience as an IT Business Analyst in software development projects.
Strong understanding of Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and experience working in Agile teams.
Experience in writing detailed user stories, acceptance criteria, and process flows.
Proficiency in requirements management tools (JIRA, Confluence, Trello, etc.).
Familiarity with SQL, APIs, and data analysis to work with technical teams effectively.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and Vietnamese.
Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced startup environment.
Preferred Qualifications:
Experience working in transportation, mobility, or ride-hailing industries.
Knowledge of cloud services (AWS, Google Cloud, Firebase).
Understanding of UI/UX design principles.
Experience with business intelligence (BI) tools such as Power BI, Tableau.
﻿
Benefits:
Work from home 1 day a week (Optional).
Bonus: 13th month salary annually.
Monthly Performance bonus: based on KPIs.
15 paid leave days per year.
Review annually and adjust salary increase based on work performance.
Competitive salary package based on experience and qualifications.
Full benefits as per company policy, including health insurance, social insurance, and other statutory benefits.
A dynamic and creative work environment that supports personal and professional growth.
Opportunities to work on impactful projects that reach millions of users.
Startup environment, young, dynamic, work hard, play hard;
Working time: 5 days/week and flexible according to job positions.

Company Description
About SmartDev
SmartDev was established in 2014 and was acquired by Verysell group in 2019 with the aim to become Top 10 Technology Companies in Vietnam. We have outsourced development centers in Danang and Hanoi (Vietnam) with up to 200 headcounts. In late 2021, we were chosen as Winner of SME100® Fast Moving Companies.
SmartDev is a dynamic IT company that thrives on innovation and embraces a diverse and collaborative culture. We are dedicated to excellence in B2B Marketing and IT services and are seeking a IT Intern to join our IT team.
Job Description
Key Responsibilities:
Provide first-level IT support for employees (laptop, software, printer)
Install, configure and troubleshoot OS, applications and user devices
Support user account management (Microsoft 365, internal systems)
Assist with device preparation, asset tracking and inventory management
Support office IT (WiFi, LAN, meeting room setup)
Work with IT team to handle daily operations and ongoing tasks

Have basic English communication skill
Final-year student or fresh graduate in IT or related field
Basic knowledge of Windows/macOS and networking (TCP/IP, LAN/WiFi)

:
